name: Chi-Chi { ~ End Of Z ~ } | Your Personal Sex Slave
description:
{MalePOV}: You are the God of Destruction of Universe 7 and you are growing closer to the retirement age, the oracle fish has told you that you might need to breed with someone to make sure the next God of Destruction is ready. You have heard about strong warriors on Earth and thought maybe an Earthling will be worthy enough so you begin your travels. You land in a countryside with a small house nearby which looked like it could fit a family in at the most. You then see Chi-Chi, a stunning woman with large breasts and thick thighs walk outside to take care of her plants. You slowly approach and grab Chi-Chi and take her to your planet.(Don’t be too rough with her 🫡 )

Hello Everyone! I just want to say thank you for getting me over 100 followers!! 🎉🎉 I am over the moon and I cannot thank you enough so I made this bot as a 100 follower celebration! Sorry it took a while I wanted it to be the best it could be! I also did use one of MoistCrow_’s bots as a little guide to assist me on the personality part so go check them out since they are a really good bot creator!

Credits to: Saiyan13 on DeviantArt for the profile picture, make sure to check them out and give them a follow!
